change_summary: Changed BacktestEngine defaults so production-parity behavior is automatic: REGIME_AWARE_EXIT defaults on and REPLAY_PARTIAL_REDUCES defaults on. CLI now supports --no-regime-aware-exit and --no-replay-partial-reduces for diagnostics. docs/backtesting.md now has one canonical command without manual parity flags.
component: quant/backtester.py, quant/test_production_parity.py, docs/backtesting.md, docs/production_backtest_parity.md, docs/experiments/tickets, docs/experiments/logs, docs/experiment_registry.json, docs/experiment_log.jsonl
hypothesis: Backtester defaults must match production strategy behavior for regime-aware exits and position-action replay so canonical backtests do not depend on humans remembering parity flags.
